ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's geographical center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's geographical center */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terrorist_attacks" (
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the attacks occurred */,
  "number_of_attacks" INTEGER /* Total number of terrorist attacks */,
  "lethality" INTEGER /* Total lethality of the attacks */,
  "group_presence" INTEGER /* Presence of terrorist groups */,
  "mean_year_of_attacks" REAL /* Mean year of the attacks */,
  "pondered_mean_year" REAL /* Pondered mean year of the attacks */,
  "importance" INTEGER /* Importance of the country in the context of global terrorism */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the attacks */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the attacks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrorist_attacks_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terrorist_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terrorist group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the terrorist group */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the group is present */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the terrorist group */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the terrorist group was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the terrorist group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrorist_groups_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attack data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_id") REFERENCES terrorist_attacks ("attack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attack data used in the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., regional, country-specific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_id") REFERENCES terrorist_attacks ("attack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report sharing entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report that was shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the report */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* Reference to the user with whom the report was shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_sharing_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
